title: Bosch 1x CYL-3 Concrete Drill Bit (for Concrete, Stone, Masonry, 6,5 x 60 x 100 mm, d 6,0 mm, Professional Accessory for Rotary Drills and Impact Drivers from Most Brands)
features: CYL-3 Drill Bit provides lasting performance when drilling in concrete
High wear resistance from a durable carbide blend developed and manufactured by Bosch
Effective 2-flute U-shape design provides good dust removal, reducing friction and extending lifetime
Lasting performance when drilling holes for fixings in abrasive materials such as concrete and natural stones
Scope of Delivery: 1x CYL-3 Concrete Drill Bit, 6,5 x 60 x 100 mm, d 6,0 mm
description: Product Description Bosch Professional CYL-3 Concrete Drill Bit The CYL-3 Drill Bit provides lasting performance when drilling concrete. Its stamina is a result of a highly durable carbide blend specially developed and manufactured by Bosch. The blend is adapted to meet the demands of repeated use and offers high wear resistance when working with concrete. Moreover, the effective 2-flute U-shape design of the bit provides good dust removal, reducing friction, heat development and wear, resulting in an extended lifetime. The bit delivers lasting performance when drilling holes for fixings in abrasive materials such as concrete and natural stone. As proof of quality, the drill bit bears the test mark of the PGM Masonry Drill Bit Association Board, guaranteeing compliance with tight tolerances, exact drilling and the firm hold of fixings. It is compatible with cylindrical shank systems for all corded or cordless impact drills. Box Contains 1 x CYL-3 concrete drill bit
